rationale: Fingerprint `JSON.parse(X).map(FN)` variant — all 8 generators call `JSON.parse(e).map(n => ({name: n.FIELD}))` over a top-level JSON array. Feed `"[]"`: JS `JSON.parse("[]") = []`, `.map(...) = []`. Rust `split_lines+filter_empty+json_extract(sentinel)` on `"[]"` also yields `[]`. Contract holds.
